name: bmad-miro-sync-codex
description: Codex plugin wrapper for executing bmad-miro-sync plans against Miro.

interface.shortDescription: Publish BMad outputs to Miro from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Exports bmad-miro-sync plans, executes them with Codex Miro MCP tools, and records stable sync results back into the repo manifest.
defaultPrompt: Sync this BMad repo to the linked Miro board.
Export the bmad-miro-sync plan and publish it in Miro.
Update Miro from the latest BMad artifacts.
